metadata.note: V-T3 pact: the search indexer consumes merchant-catalog's menu + store-status reads (and, asynchronously, its menu.updated / store.status_changed events — schema-pinned in contracts/events/). File-based broker (see contracts/pacts/customer-bff__placeholder.json): registryctl pact-verify REPLAYS each interaction against the REAL merchant-catalog booted by ci/pact-verify.sh, asserting status + response shape. ci/pact-verify.sh pre-seeds the fixed merchant mer_01hpactcatalog0000000000000 with one item (provider state). Non-deterministic ids (item_id) are NOT pinned; stable scalars (merchant_id, store_status, item name/price/available) are.

interactions.description: read a merchant's menu to (re)build the search index
read a merchant's store status to hide closed stores from results
